MOTION FOR PREFERENCE / PREFERENTIAL SETTING
Off Calendar Aug-20-2020 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Kimberly J. Chu of BRAYTON & PURCELL LLP (415-898-1555), appearing by CourtCall for plaintiff Gerald Lierman.

The Court stated that it just received Plaintiff's Notice of Of Death And Request For Stay Of Proceedings Pending Motion To Amend The Complaint For Wrongful filed on August 19, 2020. Ms. Chu confirmed for the Court that the notice was just filed yesterday.

The Court ordered Plaintiff Gerald Lierman's Motion for Order Advancing the Current Trial Date with Preference and Extending Disovery Cutoff off calendar due to the death of the plaintiff. Judge: Cynthia Ming-mei Lee, Clerk: J. Alameda. Matter not reported. (503/CML)
